name: Solidcore Resources
description: Solidcore Resources plc is a leading precious and base metals mining company headquartered in Kazakhstan and listed on the Astana International Exchange. Formerly known as Polymetal International plc, the company manages a portfolio of producing gold mines and development projects. It oversees the entire mining lifecycle, including exploration, development, ore extraction, logistics, processing, and sales. With a focus on operational efficiency and a competitive cost structure, Solidcore Resources plays a significant role in the regional mining sector, leveraging its expertise to drive sustainable growth and value creation within the precious metals industry.
